free_text: U-235 fission cross-section for resonance energy
Gammas. Delayed coincidence between fission gammas
and gamma-rays from fission neutron capture by Cd.
See Entry 40070 for data from Table of
Statistical error is about 0.6% at data
value of 1500 barn*ROOT(eV) and about 3% at data value
Duplicative point. Reason is not clear, as also
a source of data - from authors?
